celfmt -i src.cel -o out1.cel
! stderr .
cmp out1.cel want.txt

# Verify idempotency — the original bug ate the comment on the second pass.
celfmt -i out1.cel -o out2.cel
! stderr .
cmp out1.cel out2.cel

-- src.cel --
state.a ?
	state.b
: state.c ?
	state.d
:
	// comment
	state.e ?
		state.f
	:
		state.g
-- want.txt --
state.a ?
	state.b
: state.c ?
	state.d
:
	// comment
	state.e ?
		state.f
	:
		state.g
